summary: Iteration 41 - IPL Data Fix Testing Complete. All 11 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: All 10 IPL teams displayed correctly (MI, CSK, RCB, KKR, DC, PBKS, RR, SRH, GT, LSG). No non-IPL teams found. Completed matches show real scores (127/10, 128/2, 220/4, 224/4, 203/4, 201/9). Team names not swapped. Live match MI vs CSK displayed correctly.

minor.issue: API limit is 50, not 100 - returns 422 validation error

critical_code_review_comments: Backend: _align_team_info() correctly aligns teamInfo[] to teams[] order - fixes random API swap bug
Backend: _is_strictly_ipl() uses strict whitelist of 10 IPL short names - both teams must be in whitelist
Backend: CricketData API logs show '3 IPL matches fetched, 22 non-IPL skipped' - filtering working
Backend: Auto-sync IPL schedule shows '0 created, 70 updated (total 70 matches)' - all 70 IPL matches synced
Backend: Score protection working - completed matches have non-zero scores
Frontend: Player View shows all 10 IPL teams correctly
Frontend: Live match MI vs CSK displayed with correct team names and logos
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 41 verified the IPL data fix. Key verified features: 1) All matches have IPL teams only (MI, CSK, RCB, KKR, DC, PBKS, RR, SRH, GT, LSG). 2) No non-IPL teams (Pakistan Super League, Nigeria T20 etc.) in the system. 3) Team names not swapped - DC shows Delhi Capitals, not SRH. 4) Completed matches have real scores: RCB vs SRH (203/4 vs 201/9), MI vs KKR (224/4 vs 220/4), RR vs CSK (128/2 vs 127/10). 5) Live match MI vs CSK displayed correctly. 6) 70 IPL matches synced from CricketData.org API. 7) _align_team_info() and _is_strictly_ipl() functions working correctly.

backend_apis.GET /api/matches: PASSED - Returns only IPL teams (MI, CSK, RCB, KKR, DC, PBKS, RR, SRH, GT, LSG)
backend_apis.GET /api/matches?status=completed: PASSED - Returns 3 completed matches with real scores
backend_apis.POST /api/matches/live/sync?ipl_only=tru: PASSED - Syncs only IPL matches, skips 22 non-IPL
backend_apis.POST /api/matches/live/sync-ipl-schedule: PASSED - Syncs 70 IPL matches with zero errors
backend_apis.GET /api/matches/live/status: PASSED - Cricket API key set, service connected
backend_apis.Team name consistency: PASSED - No team name swaps detected

frontend_features.login_flow: PASSED - Phone 7004186276, PIN 5524 logs in successfully
frontend_features.admin_dashboard: PASSED - Shows 71 Matches, 14 Contests, 1 LIVE MATCH
frontend_features.matches_page: PASSED - Shows 60 matches with all IPL teams
frontend_features.player_view: PASSED - Shows IPL LIVE section with 12 matches
frontend_features.live_match_display: PASSED - MI vs CSK at Wankhede Stadium

rca_of_the_issue.original_issue_1: Team names were SWAPPED (e.g., DC name showed SRH)
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause_1: CricketData.org API returns teams[] and teamInfo[] arrays in DIFFERENT random orders. Code was using teams[0] for team_a but teamInfo[0] for team_a details, causing mismatches.
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied_1: _align_team_info() function matches teamInfo[] entries to teams[] by canonical short name comparison
rca_of_the_issue.original_issue_2: Non-IPL matches (Pakistan Super League, Nigeria T20) were leaking into the system
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause_2: Previous filtering was not strict enough - partial name matching allowed non-IPL teams
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied_2: _is_strictly_ipl() function uses strict whitelist of 10 IPL short names - BOTH teams must be in the whitelist
rca_of_the_issue.verification: Backend logs show '3 IPL matches fetched, 22 non-IPL skipped' - filtering working correctly
